title: Draft README setting.json updates with PATH guidance
summary: Prepare documentation changes for README examples to include PATH guidance for Homebrew-installed binaries.
acceptance_criteria: README update scope is clearly defined for both English and Japanese docs.
Proposed setting.json snippet includes PATH guidance exactly as specified in the plan.
No references to workspace_root are included in the updated snippet.

steps.description: Identify README files that contain setting.json examples.
Draft the updated setting.json snippet with PATH guidance.
Record intended documentation update targets and snippet placement.

notes: Ticket is doc-planning only; no runtime changes.
Snippet must match the plan’s PATH example exactly.
